name: dmx-macro-pad
description: Headless Raspberry Pi DMX512 lighting controller with mobile web UI

scripts.deploy: rsync -av --exclude=node_modules --exclude='.git' -e 'sshpass -p dmx512 ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no' ./ dmx@dmx-macro-pad.local:~/dmx-macro-pad/ && sshpass -p dmx512 ssh dmx@dmx-macro-pad.local 'sudo systemctl restart dmx-macro-pad'
scripts.deploy:restart: sshpass -p dmx512 ssh dmx@dmx-macro-pad.local 'sudo systemctl restart dmx-macro-pad'
scripts.deploy:reload: sshpass -p dmx512 ssh dmx@dmx-macro-pad.local 'sudo systemctl kill -s HUP dmx-macro-pad'
